Synthetic Studio

Frontend Engineer (React)

Synthetic Studio is hiring a Frontend Engineer to ship our next-gen design tool.

What you will do

  • Build complex interactive UIs in React 19 + TypeScript
  • Own design system components and accessibility
  • Partner with product to push the product forward

About you

  • 4+ years of frontend engineering, mostly React
  • Strong TypeScript
  • You care deeply about UX and visual polish

Nice to have

  • Tailwind, Framer Motion, animation work
  • WebGL or Canvas

Where

London, UK or Remote (UK only). £85,000 - £115,000 + equity.

© Synthetic Studio
